notes: Representative output captured from a local PerfCopilot analysis run.

parsed.summary: Version B is 473.5% slower at the largest n and the observed scaling shifts from O(n) toward O(n^2).
parsed.best_fit_complexity: A best fit: O(n) (0.91) B best fit: O(n^2) (0.87)
regression_bullets: Curve shape indicates a likely complexity class regression.
likely_causes: Nested membership checks behaving like repeated scans.
evidence: Runtime growth diverges sharply while memory growth remains secondary.
optimization_direction: Replace repeated linear membership checks with a hash-based structure.
risks: Hash-based optimizations trade memory for speed and depend on stable equality semantics.
